Total passenger movements (Monthly): Actual series are counts derived from a sample of records from April 1975 to August 1997, and hence may contain sample error for these periods.
Sampled series are derived from a sample of records and hence may contain sample error. Caution should be used when using data with low cell values.

Seasonally adjusted series are derived indirectly as the sum of seasonally adjusted 'overseas visitors', 'NZ-resident', and 'permanent and long-term' series. From November 2018, the seasonally adjusted departure series is derived directly.

The COVID-19 pandemic interrupted historical seasonal patterns and months from March 2020 to November 2022 and quarters from June 2020 to December 2022 reflect observed actual values without seasonal, trading day, or holiday adjustment.
Trend series are suppressed for months from March 2020 to December 2022 and quarters from June 2020 to December 2022 due to the impact of COVID-19.
